given: Repository content originally referenced 'JAC' and docs/jac; working copy edits made; tests and validator exist.
must: Rename docs/jac to docs/jacks and update references
Remove JAC_REVIEW_OK env fallback from hook rules (only JACK_REVIEW_OK or approval artifacts accepted)
Add gitleaks secret scan to CI and run pre-commit checks
Validator and hook regression tests must pass
must_not: Introduce new secrets into the repository
Leave hidden or non-LF characters in tracked files
wiring_claim: jac_hook_rules.py only checks JACK_REVIEW_OK or repository approval artifacts; .github/workflows/validate-jac.yml runs pre-commit, gitleaks, and tests; .gitignore now ignores .venv; docs moved to docs/jacks
